ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* The architecture of the instance (e.g., arm64, x86) */,
  "memory_mb" INTEGER /* Memory allocated to the instance, in MB */,
  "workers" INTEGER /* Number of workers used in processing tasks */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "cores" INTEGER /* Number of processing cores available */,
  "proc_time" REAL /* Processing time in seconds for the tasks executed */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance associated with the metrics */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "network_in" TEXT /* Network input in bytes */,
  "network_out" TEXT /* Network output in bytes */,
  "disk_read" TEXT /* Disk read operations in bytes */,
  "disk_write" TEXT /* Disk write operations in bytes */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task being executed */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task associated with the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud instance */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture type of the instance */,
  "region" TEXT /* Cloud region where the instance is deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instance (e.g., active, inactive, terminated) */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of instance (e.g., t2.micro, m5.large) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instance */,
  "last_heartbeat" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last heartbeat from the instance */,
  "total_memory_mb" INTEGER /* Total memory allocated to the instance, in MB */,
  "total_cores" INTEGER /* Total number of cores available in the instance */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instances_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing performance metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
